policy_statement: Retrofit 20% of smaller residential buildings (4 or fewer units) by 2030, and 50% by 2040, prioritizing low- or moderate-income households.
verbatim_text: "Retrofit implementation strategies vary by building type and each building's unique needs." A. Retrofit residential buildings with 4 or fewer units: 20% by 2030 and 50% by 2040, prioritizing low- or moderate-income households.
preceding_paragraph: Retrofit implementation strategies vary by building type and each building's unique needs.
extraction_rationale: Policy action with explicit quantifiable targets under a named strategy; includes a defined implementation pathway and beneficiary focus.

policy_statement: Retrofit 20% of total 5+ unit residential buildings by 2030.
verbatim_text: "Retrofit implementation strategies vary by building type and each building's unique needs." B. Retrofit 20% of total 5+ unit residential buildings by 2030.
preceding_paragraph: Retrofit implementation strategies vary by building type and each building's unique needs.
extraction_rationale: Policy action with a clear target for a specific building category under Retrofit Buildings.

policy_statement: Retrofit 20% of total industrial buildings by 2030.
verbatim_text: "Retrofit implementation strategies vary by building type and each building's unique needs." C. Retrofit 20% of total industrial buildings by 2030.
preceding_paragraph: Retrofit implementation strategies vary by building type and each building's unique needs.
extraction_rationale: Policy action with a clear target for industrial buildings under Retrofit Buildings.

policy_statement: Retrofit 90% of total City-owned and Sister Agency-owned buildings by 2035.

preceding_paragraph: Retrofit implementation strategies vary by building type and each building's unique needs.
extraction_rationale: Policy action with a target for city-owned buildings; specifies implementation pathway.

policy_statement: Retrofit 20% of total commercial buildings by 2035.
verbatim_text: "Retrofit implementation strategies vary by building type and each building's unique needs." E. Retrofit 20% of total commercial buildings by 2035.
preceding_paragraph: Retrofit implementation strategies vary by building type and each building's unique needs.
extraction_rationale: Policy action with a target for commercial buildings; part of Retrofit Buildings strategy.

policy_statement: Install 5 megawatts of co-owned community solar projects by 2025.
verbatim_text: "Expanding innovative community ownership models for renewable energy projects on City property and utilizing state funding will help Chicago achieve 100% clean renewable energy community-wide by 2035." A. Install 5 megawatts of co-owned community solar projects by 2025.

preceding_paragraph: Expanding innovative community ownership models for renewable energy projects on City property and utilizing state funding will help Chicago achieve 100% clean renewable energy community-wide by 2035.

extraction_rationale: Policy action with a target for co-owned community solar; part of Strategy 2.
